name: FORUM ENERGY TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
business: Forum Energy Technologies, Inc. is a global manufacturing company serving oil, natural gas, defense, and renewable energy industries. It sells highly engineered capital equipment and consumable products to oil and natural gas operators, oilfield service companies, pipeline and refinery operators, defense contractors, and renewable energy companies. Approximately 80% of revenue in 2025 came from consumable products and activity-based equipment.

exposures.sentence: FET's customers include oil and natural gas operators, oilfield service companies, pipeline and refinery operators, defense contractors and renewable energy companies.

Our Drilling and Completions segment designs, manufactures and supplies products and solutions to the drilling, subsea, coiled tubing, well stimulation and intervention markets, including applications in the oil and natural gas, renewable energy, defense and communications industries.

Subsea product line is affected by global offshore activity, government defense system initiatives, subsea equipment and pipeline installation, repair and maintenance expenditures, and growth in offshore windfarm development.
